    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    L

    limitCalculator - Variable in class app.App
    Calculates and recalculates the daily spending limit.
    limitCalculator - Variable in class control.ExpenseManager
    Recalculates the daily spending limit after each expense.
    LimitCalculator - Class in control
    Calculates daily spending limits based on the remaining balance and remaining days in the active BudgetCycle.
    LimitCalculator() - Constructor for class control.LimitCalculator
    Constructs a LimitCalculator backed by the singleton DatabaseHelper.
    loadCategories() - Method in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Populates the category combo box with all categories from the database and syncs ExpenseLoggingScreen.selectedCategory to the first item.
    loadDashboardData() - Method in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Loads and refreshes all dashboard data: total spent, daily limit, today's gauge fill, and the pie chart.
    loadedExpenses - Variable in class ui.HistoryScreen
    In-memory list of expenses currently loaded into the table.
    loadTransactions() - Method in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Clears and reloads the table from the database.
    LOCKOUT_DURATION - Static variable in class control.AuthManager
    Duration of the lockout period in seconds.
    lockoutTime - Variable in class control.AuthManager
    Time at which the lockout expires; null when not locked out.
    lockOutTimerLabel - Variable in class ui.LockScreen
    Label showing the remaining lockout time in seconds.
    LockScreen - Class in ui
    Screen shown at startup when a PIN has been set.
    LockScreen(App) - Constructor for class ui.LockScreen
    Constructs the LockScreen.
    logExpense(double, int) - Method in class app.App
    Logs a new expense under the active cycle.
    logExpense(double, int, int) - Method in class control.ExpenseManager
    Logs a new expense, persists it, recalculates the daily limit, and checks budget thresholds.
    logExpenseBtn - Variable in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Button that navigates to the expense logging screen.
